RUNIC_DOME.title: Runic Dome
RUNIC_DOME.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your turn. You can no longer see enemy [gold]intents[/gold].
FUSION_HAMMER.title: Fusion Hammer
FUSION_HAMMER.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your turn. You can no longer [gold]Smith[/gold] at Rest Sites.
FUSION_HAMMER.flavor: Once wielded, the owner can never let go.
COFFEE_DRIPPER.title: Coffee Dripper
COFFEE_DRIPPER.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your turn. You can no longer [gold]Rest[/gold] at Rest Sites.
COFFEE_DRIPPER.flavor: "Yes, another cup please. Back to work. Back to work!" - The Architect
CURSED_KEY.title: Cursed Key
CURSED_KEY.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your turn. Everytime you open a chest, obtain a unique [red]Curse[/red].
CURSED_KEY.flavor: You can feel the malicious energy emanating from the key. Power comes at a price.
HOVERING_KITE.title: Hovering Kite
HOVERING_KITE.description: The first time you discard a card each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
HOVERING_KITE.flavor: The Kite floats around you in battle, propelled by a mysterious force.
NUCLEAR_BATTERY.title: Nuclear Battery
NUCLEAR_BATTERY.description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]{Plasma}[/blue] [gold]Plasma[/gold].
TOY_ORNITHOPTER.title: Toy Ornithopter
TOY_ORNITHOPTER.description: Whenever you use a [gold]potion[/gold], heal [blue]{HEAL_AMT:diff()}[/blue] HP.
TOY_ORNITHOPTER.flavor: "This little toy is the perfect companion for the lone adventurer!"
PRESERVED_INSECT.title: Preserved Insect
PRESERVED_INSECT.description: Enemies in Elite combats have [blue]{HP_REDUCTION:diff()}%[/blue] less HP.
PRESERVED_INSECT.flavor: The insect seems to create a shrinking aura that targets particularly large enemies.
QUESTION_CARD.title: Question Card
QUESTION_CARD.description: Future card rewards have [blue]{EXTRA_CARDS:diff()}[/blue] additional {EXTRA_CARDS::plural:card|cards} to choose from.
QUESTION_CARD.flavor: Those with more choices minimize the downside to chaos.- Kublai the Great
FOSSILIZED_HELIX.title: Fossilized Helix
FOSSILIZED_HELIX.description: Prevent the first time you would lose HP each combat.
FOSSILIZED_HELIX.flavor: Seemingly indestructible, you wonder what kind of creature this belonged to.
CLOCKWORK_SOUVENIR.title: Clockwork Souvenir
INCENSE_BURNER.title: Incense Burner
INCENSE_BURNER.flavor: The smoke imbues its owner with the spirit of the burned.
ORANGE_PELLETS.title: Orange Pellets
ORANGE_PELLETS.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Power[/gold], [gold]Attack[/gold], and [gold]Skill[/gold] in the same turn, remove all of your debuffs.
ORANGE_PELLETS.flavor: Made from various fungi found throughout the Spire, they will stave off any affliction.
DEAD_BRANCH.title: Dead Branch
DEAD_BRANCH.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, add a random card to your hand.
DEAD_BRANCH.flavor: The branch of a tree from a forgotten era.
BUSTED_CROWN.title: Busted Crown
BUSTED_CROWN.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your turn. Future card rewards have [blue]{REDUCTION:diff()}[/blue] less cards to choose from.
BUSTED_CROWN.flavor: The Champ's crown... or a pale imitation?
SUNDIAL.title: Sundial
SUNDIAL.description: Every [blue]{SHUFFLES:diff()}[/blue] times you shuffle your draw pile, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SUNDIAL.flavor: "Early man's foolish obsession with time caused them to look to the sky for guidance, hoping for something permanent." - Zoroth
